title: Presence Heartbeat System
description: Build a presence system that tracks online/offline status and last seen times.
instructions:
Create a presence tracking system:

1. Serverpod endpoint that:
   - Receives heartbeat pings from clients
   - Tracks user presence in a database or cache
   - Marks users offline if no heartbeat received for 2 minutes
   - Provides a stream of presence updates

2. Flutter PresenceService that:
   - Sends heartbeat every 30 seconds while app is active
   - Subscribes to presence updates for relevant users
   - Exposes a stream of user presence states

3. UI components:
   - Online indicator (green dot) next to user avatars
   - 'Last seen 5 minutes ago' text for offline users
   - List of online users in a chat room

Handle app lifecycle (pause/resume) appropriately.

hints.text: Use a Timer.periodic for heartbeats, but pause when app is in background.
Listen to AppLifecycleState changes to pause/resume heartbeat sending.
Consider using Redis or similar on the server for fast presence state lookups.
